changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 9

changeSet.comment: Renumber Bacteriology pages 3-8 to 4-9 to insert Isolate Creation page at position 3
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page SET page_order = page_order + 1 WHERE notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order >= 3;
changeSet.rollback: UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page SET page_order = page_order - 1 WHERE notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order >= 4;

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Isolate Creation page for Bacteriology Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create bacterial isolates from verified samples. Select parent samples and specify isolate type and number of isolates. Child isolates maintain parent-child hierarchy for traceability. Mark samples as processing complete when ready for storage assignment.

column.name: content
column.value: {"pageDescription":"Isolate Creation - Create child isolates from parent samples","dataPoints":{"isolateConfiguration":{"isolateType":{"type":"reference","label":"Isolate Type","source":"parent_sample_type","required":true},"isolateTypeFreeText":{"type":"text","label":"Isolate Type Description","required":false},"numberOfIsolates":{"type":"number","label":"Number of Isolates","min":1,"max":20,"default":1,"required":true}},"creationMetadata":{"createdBy":{"type":"text","label":"Created By","required":true},"creationDate":{"type":"dateTime","label":"Creation Date/Time","required":true},"notes":{"type":"text","label":"Notes","required":false}}},"systemActions":["Create child samples with parent reference","Maintain hierarchy order","Generate unique isolate identifiers"],"bulkOperations":{"enabled":true,"applyToSelected":["isolateType","isolateTypeFreeText","numberOfIsolates"]},"previousPage":"Laboratory Reception & Verification","nextPage":"Temporary Storage Assignment"}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'BACTERIOLOGY' AND name = 'Isolate Creation'

changeSet.comment: Add workflow page template for Bacteriology Isolate Creation

column.name: description
column.value: Create bacterial isolates from verified samples with parent-child hierarchy tracking

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Select parent samples and create isolates. Specify isolate type and number of isolates per parent. Child isolates are automatically linked to parents for traceability.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Isolate Creation - Child sample creation with hierarchy

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'BACTERIOLOGY' AND display_order >= 3 AND id != 209

changeSet.comment: Renumber workflow_page_template display_order for Bacteriology pages 3-8 to 4-9
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.workflow_page_template SET display_order = display_order + 1 WHERE workflow_category = 'BACTERIOLOGY' AND display_order >= 3 AND id != 209;
changeSet.rollback: UPDATE clinlims.workflow_page_template SET display_order = display_order - 1 WHERE workflow_category = 'BACTERIOLOGY' AND display_order >= 4 AND id != 209;
